creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 0.3.4
- Upstream reverted to plain distutils, dont use easy_install
- DISTFILE is now a .zip (USE_ZIP)
- Remove DISTNAME or PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME (default is correct)
- Update MASTER_SITES
- Add LICENSE/LICENSE_FILE
- Update pkg-plist
- Confirm CLANG build

Changelog: https://github.com/python-greenlet/greenlet/blob/master/NEWS

Port maintainer (peter.schuller@infidyne.com) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: update, diff: ports)
